title: boronia coerulescens subsp. spinescens
intro: Boronia coerulescens subsp. spinescens, also known as Spiny Boronia, is a plant species within the Boronia genus, characterized by its woody growth and distinctive fragrance. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of flavonoids and terpenes, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The Spiny Boronia has been reported to offer various health benefits, including the relief of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the Spiny Boronia are often used in teas, tinctures, and essential oils to harness its medicinal properties.
